title: AzurCraft Map Icons [Xaero's]
description: Adds entity support for AzurCraft (aka ALMC) for Xaero's Minimap and Full Map
body:
Adds compatibility between Xaero's mapping mods and AzurCraft!

Characters will now show as profile-styled icons in both the minimap and full map.

_To use, drop the zipped file into resourcepacks and select it inside the game's menu._

"Where can I download the main mod?"
- Use the following link: [AzurCraft (aka AL MC) on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurcraft)

"I need to report a bug/issue!"
- My GitHub tickets are open-door: [ALMC Project Tracker on GitHub](https://github.com/users/azur-lane-mc-dev/projects/3/)
